## Description
A brief summary of the changes introduced in this PR.

## Related Issues
Closes #[issue-number]

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (non-functional changes)
- [ ] Code quality or configuration adjustment

## Verification & Testing
Describe the verification steps you ran to validate your changes:
- Command(s) executed: e.g. `pnpm run lint` or `pytest`
- Output / logs snapshot:

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
